visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand inside a large, brightly lit Costco retail warehouse. The woman on the left has long, straight dark hair and wears a lavender short-sleeved shirt; she is struggling to embrace a massive, bright green plush T-Rex dinosaur which takes up most of her torso. The woman on the right wears a dark blue off-the-shoulder ruffled top, a textured grey bucket hat, and blue denim shorts. She gestures excitedly with both hands towards the plush, her face showing a wide smile and high energy as they stand in an aisle filled with pink plush toys in the background. (2) The camera remains static at eye-level. The woman in the bucket hat dominates the narration, pointing her finger upwards while speaking directly to the camera. Several cartoon-style 'wah' text bubbles in yellow and pink flicker around them on screen. A large, stylized text graphic saying 'Huge Hugging Dragon' in blue and yellow occupies the lower third of the frame. The lighting is bright and even, characteristic of a large commercial store environment, highlighting the vibrant green texture of the plush toy. (3) The woman in the blue top reaches for a green and white checkered blanket that was apparently attached to or inside the dinosaur plush. She unfolds the blanket to reveal a grid pattern where each square contains a dark green silhouette of characters from the 'Toy Story' movie franchise. She holds the blanket up close to the lens, moving it slightly to catch the light, showing off the soft fleece texture. The woman holding the dinosaur continues to support the heavy plush toy in the background, smiling as the focus shifts to the accessory. (4) The camera cuts to a tighter shot focusing on the head of the green dinosaur plush. Its eyes are large and black with a small white highlight, and its mouth is open in a classic 'Rex' expression with white felt teeth. The woman in the hat reaches in to squeeze the plush's soft body, demonstrating its squishiness. She then looks back at the camera, holding up one finger to give a final piece of advice or warning about the weight of the toy.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 哇. [Slogan]: 超大抱抱龍. (2) [Variety]: 超好看的. (3) [Slogan]: 2249元. (4) [Subtitle]: 你想你去迪士尼. [Subtitle]: 沒有辦法把這麼大隻的. [Subtitle]: 扛回家. (5) [Subtitle]: 但現在好事多可以扛回家. (6) [Slogan]: 有附毯子. (7) [Subtitle]: 這毯子你有看到嗎. [Subtitle]: 是那個牧羊女. [Subtitle]: 還有小士兵彈簧狗. (8) [Variety]: 好可愛. (9) [Slogan]: 玩具總動員的角色在裡面. (10) [Subtitle]: 看他的臉他的臉. [Subtitle]: 抱起來超療癒的. (11) [Subtitle]: 但也很重. (12) [Subtitle]: 所以適合10歲以上的小朋友抱. [Subtitle]: 不然會拿不動.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a lavender shirt. The other woman wears a blue off-the-shoulder top, a grey bucket hat, and denim shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, showing shelves stocked with various plush toys, including pink Lotso bears and rainbow-colored items. Bright fluorescent industrial lighting is visible.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins with high-pitched, enthusiastic speech, characterized by a fast rate and energetic upward inflections. An upbeat, medium-tempo pop music track plays in the background with a steady, percussive beat. The overall acoustic profile is bright and sharp, emphasizing high-frequency clarity. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect triggers a transition. The speaker's voice maintains a high arousal level, emphasizing specific words like prices. The BGM remains consistent in volume and texture, providing a rhythmic pulse underneath the dialogue. The voice dominates the mix with a clear signal-to-noise ratio. (3) Another 'ding' sound effect occurs as the speaker shifts focus to the blanket's features. The vocal quality is clear and professional, with frequent dynamic intonations. Ambient warehouse noise is minimal, effectively masked by the BGM and vocal tracking. (4) A series of short, cartoonish 'boing' sound effects accompany the rhythmic movement of the blanket. The speaker's tone remains friendly and comedic, with high valence. The music continues with a simple, repetitive harmonic loop that builds a sense of playful excitement. (5) A final 'click' or 'thud' effect as the camera focuses on the plush's face. The speaker's volume increases slightly as she laughs, indicating high arousal. The audio track ends with a sharp, synchronized stop of the music and speech.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Highlight (Size/Price) -> Accessory Reveal -> Practical Review -> Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and review a specific Toy Story Rex dinosaur plush toy available at Costco, highlighting its large size, affordable price, and included character-themed blanket to encourage viewers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly features the Costco brand logo, discusses the price, and showcases the product's features in a promotional manner.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media editing styles with heavy text overlays and playful sound effects to maintain high engagement.
